objective: Repair CleanMac reimagined dashboard PNG assets so the app uses real generated images aligned with docs/design/assets/reimagined-cleanmac-dashboard.png instead of SF Symbol fallbacks.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when a branch from the latest origin/main contains regenerated project PNG assets for the mismatched mascot/feature artwork, SwiftUI loads those real bundle PNGs with source guards preventing SF Symbol fallback regressions, a fresh app screenshot has been generated for comparison against docs/design/assets/reimagined-cleanmac-dashboard.png, swift test, git diff --check, and ./script/build_and_run.sh --verify all pass, .loopgoal/state.json records the final state, and the intended changes are committed.

phases.name: Initialize checkpoint and branch from latest origin/main
Write failing source guards for real PNG usage
Regenerate PNG assets and wire SwiftUI resource loading

current.focus: Six generated chroma-key sources were copied into Sources/CleanMac/Resources/ImagesSource and converted to alpha PNGs in Sources/CleanMac/Resources/Images. CleanMacFeatureImage no longer falls back to CleanMacPulseIcon/SF Symbols when an illustration is missing. The red source guard now passes, and the PNG existence/decode guard passes. Resource metadata confirms all six runtime assets are 1254x1254 RGBA PNGs with alpha.
current.next_action: Generate a fresh dashboard screenshot with CLEANMAC_UI_SNAPSHOT_DIR, compare it against docs/design/assets/reimagined-cleanmac-dashboard.png, then run full verification commands.

decisions.reason: The user requested a result-driven repair with explicit verification and commit gates, not a recurring time-based loop.

decisions.decision: Start from latest origin/main instead of continuing the previous feature branch history directly.
decisions.reason: The user explicitly requested using the latest remote main as the branch base; origin/main was fetched and advanced to 8ecf383.

decisions.decision: Keep subagents read-only for investigation only.
decisions.reason: The user-provided AGENTS.md instructions forbid subagents from editing files, committing, reverting, installing dependencies, or running destructive commands.

decisions.decision: Use source guards for bundle PNG usage rather than relying only on screenshots.
decisions.reason: The regression risk is SwiftUI silently falling back to SF Symbols or missing generated PNGs; tests should catch that at source/resource level.

decisions.decision: Regenerate all six existing dashboard illustration PNGs rather than only the most obvious mismatch.
decisions.reason: The design comparison found every existing mascot/feature image diverged from the reference dashboard, and mixing old and new illustration styles would preserve the alignment problem.

decisions.decision: Keep the scope to the six existing dashboard illustration assets and not add feature-app-uninstall in this pass.
decisions.reason: The user asked to align current mascot/feature PNGs in the reimagined dashboard; adding a new app-uninstall asset would expand SwiftUI mapping and screenshot scope beyond the specific dashboard mismatch.

decisions.decision: Regenerate feature-duplicates with a green chroma-key background.
decisions.reason: The first magenta-key duplicate-documents asset preserved the concept but despill washed out lavender accents; green keying preserved the purple/lavender reference colors without visible key fringe.
